title: **Self-contained**: no org Hangfire / ELK / Seq / notification platform. ACMP bundles its own — all runtime dependencies bundled (incl. self-hosted Keycloak + SQL Server) per ADR-0015; the only extern
statement: **Self-contained**: no org Hangfire / ELK / Seq / notification platform. ACMP bundles its own — all runtime dependencies bundled (incl. self-hosted Keycloak + SQL Server) per ADR-0015; the only external dependency is Webex (Phase 2, via pluggable adapter).
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-001", "Constraint": "**Self-contained**: no org Hangfire / ELK / Seq / notification platform. ACMP bundles its own — all runtime dependencies bundled (incl. self-hosted Keycloak + SQL Server) per ADR-0015; the only external dependency is Webex (Phase 2, via pluggable adapter).", "Source": "README CON-001"}}

title: **Mandated technology stack**: Backend must be .NET 8 (LTS) / ASP.NET Core. Frontend must be React 18 + TypeScript + Vite. Database must be Microsoft SQL Server. No deviations without an explicit ADR.
statement: **Mandated technology stack**: Backend must be .NET 8 (LTS) / ASP.NET Core. Frontend must be React 18 + TypeScript + Vite. Database must be Microsoft SQL Server. No deviations without an explicit ADR. (Implication: No Go, Python (except Tarseem sidecar), Java, Postgres, MongoDB, or other stacks for the ACMP application itself.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-002", "Constraint": "**Mandated technology stack**: Backend must be .NET 8 (LTS) / ASP.NET Core. Frontend must be React 18 + TypeScript + Vite. Database must be Microsoft SQL Server. No deviations without an explicit ADR. (Implication: No Go, Python (except Tarseem sidecar), Java, Postgres, MongoDB, or other stacks for the ACMP application itself.)", "Source": "README §A; ADR-0001–ADR-0003, ADR-0012", "Type": "Technical", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **On-prem VM + Docker Compose; no Kubernetes**: Deployment is Docker Compose on one or two VMs. No Kubernetes, Helm, service mesh, or container orchestration platform. (Implication: Resource limits, s
statement: **On-prem VM + Docker Compose; no Kubernetes**: Deployment is Docker Compose on one or two VMs. No Kubernetes, Helm, service mesh, or container orchestration platform. (Implication: Resource limits, secret management, and scaling are all VM/Compose-level concerns. No K8s features (ConfigMaps, Secrets, Ingress controllers) may be assumed.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-003", "Constraint": "**On-prem VM + Docker Compose; no Kubernetes**: Deployment is Docker Compose on one or two VMs. No Kubernetes, Helm, service mesh, or container orchestration platform. (Implication: Resource limits, secret management, and scaling are all VM/Compose-level concerns. No K8s features (ConfigMaps, Secrets, Ingress controllers) may be assumed.)", "Source": "README §A; ADR-0001", "Type": "Deployment", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **Scale ceiling ≤20 total users; right-size everything**: No HA cluster, no horizontal scaling, no heavy performance engineering. 99.9% availability via simple standby VM + nightly backups. (Implicati
statement: **Scale ceiling ≤20 total users; right-size everything**: No HA cluster, no horizontal scaling, no heavy performance engineering. 99.9% availability via simple standby VM + nightly backups. (Implication: Do not engineer for 1,000 concurrent users. Reject any architectural addition (Redis, message broker, CDN) whose sole justification is scalability beyond 20 users.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-004", "Constraint": "**Scale ceiling ≤20 total users; right-size everything**: No HA cluster, no horizontal scaling, no heavy performance engineering. 99.9% availability via simple standby VM + nightly backups. (Implication: Do not engineer for 1,000 concurrent users. Reject any architectural addition (Redis, message broker, CDN) whose sole justification is scalability beyond 20 users.)", "Source": "README §A (settled decision 2026-06-24)", "Type": "Technical", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **No message brokers in ACMP's own infrastructure**: No RabbitMQ, Kafka, or similar broker as part of ACMP's own runtime. Background work is handled by app-owned Hangfire on SQL. (Implication: Hangfir
statement: **No message brokers in ACMP's own infrastructure**: No RabbitMQ, Kafka, or similar broker as part of ACMP's own runtime. Background work is handled by app-owned Hangfire on SQL. (Implication: Hangfire + SQL outbox is the messaging layer. Async patterns are task-queue only, not event streaming.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-005", "Constraint": "**No message brokers in ACMP's own infrastructure**: No RabbitMQ, Kafka, or similar broker as part of ACMP's own runtime. Background work is handled by app-owned Hangfire on SQL. (Implication: Hangfire + SQL outbox is the messaging layer. Async patterns are task-queue only, not event streaming.)", "Source": "README §A; ADR-0001", "Type": "Technical", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **No email in v1**: Email notifications are deferred until an SMTP relay is available. In-app notification center is the sole channel in PH-1. (Implication: `INotificationChannel` abstraction must be
statement: **No email in v1**: Email notifications are deferred until an SMTP relay is available. In-app notification center is the sole channel in PH-1. (Implication: `INotificationChannel` abstraction must be in place so email adapter can be added without modifying dispatch code. Alert users only via in-app center and (PH-2) Webex.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-006", "Constraint": "**No email in v1**: Email notifications are deferred until an SMTP relay is available. In-app notification center is the sole channel in PH-1. (Implication: `INotificationChannel` abstraction must be in place so email adapter can be added without modifying dispatch code. Alert users only via in-app center and (PH-2) Webex.)", "Source": "README §A (settled 2026-06-24); ADR-0005", "Type": "Product", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **No public self-registration or anonymous access**: All access is provisioned by Administrator/Secretary via Keycloak. No public-facing registration endpoint. (Implication: `POST /api/register` does
statement: **No public self-registration or anonymous access**: All access is provisioned by Administrator/Secretary via Keycloak. No public-facing registration endpoint. (Implication: `POST /api/register` does not exist. OIDC callback is the only entry point.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-007", "Constraint": "**No public self-registration or anonymous access**: All access is provisioned by Administrator/Secretary via Keycloak. No public-facing registration endpoint. (Implication: `POST /api/register` does not exist. OIDC callback is the only entry point.)", "Source": "README §A; ADR-0004; CON-003", "Type": "Security", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **EN and AR are both first-class, not additive**: Full bilingual support and RTL layout from the first PH-1 release. Not a v2 retrofit. (Implication: Every UI component must be built with logical CSS
statement: **EN and AR are both first-class, not additive**: Full bilingual support and RTL layout from the first PH-1 release. Not a v2 retrofit. (Implication: Every UI component must be built with logical CSS from day 1. Every user-visible string must exist in both locale files before the feature ships. RTL regression must pass in CI.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-008", "Constraint": "**EN and AR are both first-class, not additive**: Full bilingual support and RTL layout from the first PH-1 release. Not a v2 retrofit. (Implication: Every UI component must be built with logical CSS from day 1. Every user-visible string must exist in both locale files before the feature ships. RTL regression must pass in CI.)", "Source": "README §A; ADR-0012; P-07", "Type": "Product", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **Keycloak is the sole IdP; roles sourced from Keycloak claims**: ACMP does not store or assign global roles. It reads claims on token validation and maps to canonical roles. (Implication: ACMP cannot
statement: **Keycloak is the sole IdP; roles sourced from Keycloak claims**: ACMP does not store or assign global roles. It reads claims on token validation and maps to canonical roles. (Implication: ACMP cannot have a "role management" screen that changes Keycloak data. Role assignment is done in Keycloak; ACMP reads the result.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-009", "Constraint": "**Keycloak is the sole IdP; roles sourced from Keycloak claims**: ACMP does not store or assign global roles. It reads claims on token validation and maps to canonical roles. (Implication: ACMP cannot have a \"role management\" screen that changes Keycloak data. Role assignment is done in Keycloak; ACMP reads the result.)", "Source": "README §A; ADR-0004", "Type": "Security", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **Single committee; no multi-committee generalization**: v1 is built for exactly one committee. No tenant IDs, no committee selection, no committee-scoped routing. (Implication: Reject any data-model
statement: **Single committee; no multi-committee generalization**: v1 is built for exactly one committee. No tenant IDs, no committee selection, no committee-scoped routing. (Implication: Reject any data-model change that adds a committee entity as a root tenant discriminator unless a new explicit decision reverses this.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-010", "Constraint": "**Single committee; no multi-committee generalization**: v1 is built for exactly one committee. No tenant IDs, no committee selection, no committee-scoped routing. (Implication: Reject any data-model change that adds a committee entity as a root tenant discriminator unless a new explicit decision reverses this.)", "Source": "README §A (settled 2026-06-24)", "Type": "Product", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **Voting always attributed in v1; no anonymous voting**: Every voter's choice is recorded and visible to Auditor and Chairman. Anonymous voting mode is out of scope for v1. (Implication: The `anonymit
statement: **Voting always attributed in v1; no anonymous voting**: Every voter's choice is recorded and visible to Auditor and Chairman. Anonymous voting mode is out of scope for v1. (Implication: The `anonymity` flag on the vote configuration (FR-070 references it) is an informational field only in v1; the system always records individual votes. Full anonymity support is a future decision.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-011", "Constraint": "**Voting always attributed in v1; no anonymous voting**: Every voter's choice is recorded and visible to Auditor and Chairman. Anonymous voting mode is out of scope for v1. (Implication: The `anonymity` flag on the vote configuration (FR-070 references it) is an informational field only in v1; the system always records individual votes. Full anonymity support is a future decision.)", "Source": "README §A (ADR-0010; settled 2026-06-24)", "Type": "Security", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **Gregorian dates only; no Hijri in v1**: All date storage, display, and SLA calculations use Gregorian calendar. (Implication: No Hijri calendar library, no dual-calendar display, no Hijri date input
statement: **Gregorian dates only; no Hijri in v1**: All date storage, display, and SLA calculations use Gregorian calendar. (Implication: No Hijri calendar library, no dual-calendar display, no Hijri date input. Localized Gregorian formatting (right-to-left digit order in AR) is acceptable.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-012", "Constraint": "**Gregorian dates only; no Hijri in v1**: All date storage, display, and SLA calculations use Gregorian calendar. (Implication: No Hijri calendar library, no dual-calendar display, no Hijri date input. Localized Gregorian formatting (right-to-left digit order in AR) is acceptable.)", "Source": "README §A (settled 2026-06-24)", "Type": "Product", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **Keystone is optional**: The Research module must work fully standalone (manual entry). Keystone import is an enhancement. No hard dependency on Keystone availability. (Implication: Research Mission
statement: **Keystone is optional**: The Research module must work fully standalone (manual entry). Keystone import is an enhancement. No hard dependency on Keystone availability. (Implication: Research Mission record can be created without a Keystone package reference. The Keystone import tool is a PH-2 feature, not a gate for the Research module — build since deferred out of P15 → future per D-05, 2026-07-12; optionality unchanged.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-013", "Constraint": "**Keystone is optional**: The Research module must work fully standalone (manual entry). Keystone import is an enhancement. No hard dependency on Keystone availability. (Implication: Research Mission record can be created without a Keystone package reference. The Keystone import tool is a PH-2 feature, not a gate for the Research module — build since deferred out of P15 → future per D-05, 2026-07-12; optionality unchanged.)", "Source": "README §A; ADR-0007", "Type": "Product", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **Webex is Phase 2, adapter-only**: No Webex calls in PH-1 code. All Webex integration is behind the `INotificationChannel` and `IWebexRecordingAdapter` abstractions. (Implication: PH-1 code must comp
statement: **Webex is Phase 2, adapter-only**: No Webex calls in PH-1 code. All Webex integration is behind the `INotificationChannel` and `IWebexRecordingAdapter` abstractions. (Implication: PH-1 code must compile and run without Webex credentials configured. The adapter registers as no-op when Webex config is absent.)
custom_attributes: {"v1": {"ID": "CON-014", "Constraint": "**Webex is Phase 2, adapter-only**: No Webex calls in PH-1 code. All Webex integration is behind the `INotificationChannel` and `IWebexRecordingAdapter` abstractions. (Implication: PH-1 code must compile and run without Webex credentials configured. The adapter registers as no-op when Webex config is absent.)", "Source": "README §A (settled 2026-06-24); ADR-0005", "Type": "Product", "Status": "Approved"}}

title: **AI extraction is Phase 3; manual always available**: No AI features in PH-1 or PH-2. When delivered in PH-3, AI extraction is off by default and requires Admin activation with data-residency confirm
statement: **AI extraction is Phase 3; manual always available**: No AI features in PH-1 or PH-2. When delivered in PH-3, AI extraction is off by default and requires Admin activation with data-residency confirmation. (Implication: No LLM client code in PH-1 or PH-2 production code. Phase 3 LLM integration is behind a feature flag.)
